headline: Leading Brands to Share ESG and Climate Strategies at Sustainability LIVE: The US Summit
summary: London, 30 March 2026 – BizClik and Sustainability Magazine has announced a distinguished lineup of Chief Sustainability Officers and sustainability leaders for Sustainability LIVE: The US Summit, taking place at Navy Pier, Chicago, on 21-22 April. The two-day event will bring together senior executives from some of the world's most recognised brands to address the evolving role of sustainability leadership in driving business transformation and measurable impact. summary: With insights from leaders at Trane Technologies, Colgate-Palmolive, McDonald's, Prologis, Turner Construction Company, BrainBox AI and Clever Carbon, the playbook explores how sustainability can drive business performance. NORTHAMPTON, MA / ACCESS ...
